# Very Long Line

This is a normal paragraph.

This is an extremely long line that goes on and on without any line breaks and contains a great deal of text to test how the parser handles very long lines in markdown documents without wrapping or truncation issues that might cause problems with the AST structure or serialization process in any way whatsoever and continues even further to make absolutely sure it is genuinely long enough to be considered an edge case for the round-trip fidelity test suite being developed as part of the Nemo application specification.

Back to normal content.
